en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER. A PSALM OF THE SONS OF KORAH. LORD, you were favorable to your land; you restored the fortunes of Jacob.
zh: 耶和華啊！你恩待了你的地， 恢復了雅各的產業 。

en: You forgave the iniquity of your people; you covered all their sin. Selah
zh: 你赦免了你子民的罪孽， 遮蓋了他們的一切罪惡。

en: You withdrew all your wrath; you turned from your hot anger.
zh: 你收回了你的一切忿怒， 使你猛烈的怒氣轉消。

en: Restore us again, O God of our salvation, and put away your indignation toward us!
zh: 拯救我們的 神啊！求你復興我們， 求你止住你向我們所發的忿怒。

en: Will you be angry with us forever? Will you prolong your anger to all generations?
zh: 你要永遠向我們發怒嗎？ 你要延長你的怒氣到萬代嗎？

en: Will you not revive us again, that your people may rejoice in you?
zh: 你不使我們再活過來， 以致你的子民可以因你歡喜嗎？

en: Show us your steadfast love, O LORD, and grant us your salvation.
zh: 耶和華啊！求你使我們得見你的慈愛， 又把你的救恩賜給我們。

en: Let me hear what God the LORD will speak, for he will speak peace to his people, to his saints; but let them not turn back to folly.
zh: 我要聽 神耶和華所要說的話； 因為他應許賜平安給他的子民，給他的聖民； 但願他們不要轉向愚妄。

en: Surely his salvation is near to those who fear him, that glory may dwell in our land.
zh: 他的救恩的確臨近敬畏他的人， 使他的榮耀住在我們的地上。

en: Steadfast love and faithfulness meet; righteousness and peace kiss each other.
zh: 慈愛和信實彼此相遇， 公義和平安互相親吻。

en: Faithfulness springs up from the ground, and righteousness looks down from the sky.
zh: 信實從地上生出， 公義從天上俯視。

en: Yes, the LORD will give what is good, and our land will yield its increase.
zh: 耶和華也必賜下好處， 我們的地要多出土產。

en: Righteousness will go before him and make his footsteps a way.
zh: 公義必行在他面前， 為他的腳步預備道路。
